constraints: Used only local server at http://localhost:3100
No app code or DB changes
Single browser session reused across assertions

assertions.title: No dead tabs in Dashboard TopBar
assertions.reason: Dashboard top area showed only pipeline view; no history/config tabs were present.

steps.action: Inspect interactive elements and DOM text for history/config tabs
steps.observed: DOM check returned count=0 matches for history/config

evidence.network: Dashboard polling requests observed (e.g., GET /api/companies/:id/live-runs, GET /api/heartbeat-runs/:id/log)

assertions.title: Agent name click navigates to agent detail
assertions.reason: Clicking agent name from dashboard navigated to /agents/:agentId/dashboard and rendered AgentDetail tabs.

steps.action: Capture dashboard state before clicking an agent name
steps.expected: Agent links visible in Dashboard AgentBlock
steps.observed: Agent links visible (e.g., Active Executive, CEO)

steps.action: Click agent name link in Dashboard AgentBlock

evidence.network: Agent detail fetches observed (e.g., GET /api/agents/active-executive, GET /api/companies/:id/agents)

assertions.title: Stream content shows tool call arguments
assertions.reason: Expanded CEO stream entries showed tool call labels with argument payloads (e.g., '$ command_execution {"id":...,"command":"/bin/zsh -lc ..."}').

steps.action: Expand CEO agent block on Dashboard
steps.observed: Expanded block displayed REASONING + ACTIONS stream

steps.action: Inspect stream text for tool calls
steps.observed: Tool call lines included command_execution and command argument content

evidence.network: Live run and heartbeat log polling endpoints continuously fetched stream data

assertions.title: Stream reasoning text is expandable
assertions.reason: Reasoning entries were truncated with a 'more' control, and clicking it expanded the text (button changed to 'less').

steps.action: Inspect truncated reasoning entries in expanded stream
steps.expected: Either full text or explicit expand mechanism

steps.observed: Entry expanded (length increased from ~125 to 233 chars), control changed to 'less'

evidence.network: Dashboard stream polling continued while expansion interaction occurred

assertions.title: Stream entries have visual grouping
assertions.reason: Stream entries in expanded dashboard block were visually separated; computed styles showed spacing and top borders between grouped rows.

steps.observed: Entry rows displayed grouped layout with separators

steps.action: Check computed styles on sampled stream rows
steps.observed: Sampled rows had margin-top: 6px and border-top: 1px solid

evidence.network: Same dashboard stream polling endpoints provided grouped entry content

frictions.description: Cursor-interactive refs for agent rows were ambiguous (single ref resolved to multiple nodes).
frictions.resolution: Used DOM-targeted eval click on the CEO row, then re-snapshotted to continue assertions.

interactiveChecks.check: DOM search for history/config labels in clickable/tab elements
URL transition after clicking dashboard agent name
Expanded stream text contains tool name + argument payload
Reasoning expansion control and text length
interactiveChecks.observed: Collapsed entries showed 'more'; after click button became 'less' and sample text length was 233

interactiveChecks.check: Computed styles of sampled stream rows
interactiveChecks.observed: Sample rows showed margin-top: 6px and border-top: 1px solid

summary: Tested 5 assertions for gui-browser: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Dashboard stream data was available for all stream-dependent checks.
